category_sources: source_facts.description says command-line program for getting and setting the contents of the X selection.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is xsel; official homepage and GitHub repository use xsel.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official xsel page and is the best official documentation surface found for the project.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/kfish/xsel, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies X selection get/set behavior; source_facts.executables lists xsel.
